menu_text:
--- Menu Page: http://johnnyshideaway.com/menu ---
Johnny's Hideaway - Food Menu
Our Menu
Menu
*Advisory: consuming raw or uncooked foods such as meat, poultry, fish, and eggs may increase the risk of food-borne illness.
Starters
Chips & Salsa
$6.50
Our homemade salsa is served with tortilla chips.
Sampler Platter
$18.99
Two cheese sticks, two potato skins, two chicken tenders, and onion rings. Served with dipping sauces.
Potato Skins
$10.99
Golden and deep-fried with bacon, cheese, and sour cream.
Basket Of Onion Rings
$9.99
A full basket of battered onion rings. Served with Cajun ranch sauce.
Chips & Queso
$10.25
Served with a side of jalapeños.
Fried Cheese Sticks
$10.99
Served with a side of our homemade marinara sauce.
Buffalo Shrimp
$15.99
8 lightly breaded fried shrimp tossed in Buffalo sauce. Served with fries or tater tots. Choice of ranch or blue cheese dressing.
Southwest Egg Rolls
$12.99
3 Southwest chicken egg rolls made with spinach, black beans, kernel corn, red bell peppers, and pepper jack cheese. Served with a side of Cajun ranch.
Jalapeño Poppers
$12.50
8 breaded cheddar cheese and jalapeño popper bites with a crispy potato flake breading. Served with a side of ranch.
Other Bites
Jumbo Wings Wings
$12.50/+
6 for $12.50, 10 for $19.75 | Tossed in one of our famous sauces served with celery and bleu cheese or ranch | Sauces: hot, mild, medium, teriyaki, sweet heat, BBQ, honey BBQ, or lemon pepper. All flats or drums for an additional $4.00.
Nachos
$11.50
Crispy-cut tortillas piled high, covered with cheddar/Jack, queso, onions, jalapeños, lettuce, and tomatoes. Served with a side of sour cream and salsa | Add chicken or beef for an additional +$6.25.
Chicken Tender Basket
$15.99
Hand-battered jumbo tenders with a side of fries & honey mustard.
Tacos
$15.75
Three soft shell tacos with lettuce, tomato, and cheddar/Jack cheese. Your choice of beef or chicken. Served with a side of sour cream and chips and salsa.
Quesadillas
$9.75
Crispy tortilla stuffed with cheddar/Jack cheese served with homemade salsa, sour cream, and a side of jalapeños | Add chicken or beef for an additional +$6.25.
Sandwiches
All sandwiches are served with your choice of bread and side.
Johnny's BLT
$10.99
Bacon, lettuce & tomato served on your choice of bread | All sandwiches are served with your choice of side.
Chicken Sandwich
$15.99
6 oz. chicken breast grilled/fried on a fresh brioche bun with lettuce, tomato, and sliced onion. Served with a side of mayonnaise. Toss in buffalo or one of our famous sauces upon request. Add cheese for an additional $0.95.
Johnny's Cheesesteak
$14.99
Shaved beef with onions, sautéed mushrooms, and white American cheese on a hoagie roll. All sandwiches are served with your choice of side.
Johnny's Club Sandwich
$13.99
Ham, turkey & bacon with lettuce and tomato on your choice of bread. All sandwiches are served with your choice of side.
Burgers & Melts
All burgers are served with your choice of bread, side & a pickle.
Patty Melt
$15.99
8 oz. Angus beef on your choice of bread with Swiss & grilled onions. Substitute chicken for no additional charge.
Cheeseburger
$15.99
8oz. hand-patted Angus beef topped with lettuce, tomato, onion, sliced pickles, and your choice of American, white American, or Swiss cheese. Served with a side of mayonnaise | Add bacon or mushrooms for an additional +$1.75.
Additional Sides
Basket Of Tater Tots
$7.99
Basket Of French Fries
$6.99
Side Salad
$7.99
Mixed greens, tomatoes, onions, cheddar/jack cheese, cucumbers and croutons
French Fries
$5.99
Tater Tots
$5.99
Broccoli
$5.99
Pasta Salad
$4.99
Tri-colored pasta, diced tomato, sliced black olives, and Italian seasoning topped with a light touch of parmesan cheese. Cup $4.99 / Bowl $6.99
Soups & Salads
All are served with your choice of dressing. Homemade honey mustard, ranch, bleu cheese, Caesar, balsamic vinaigrette or Cajun ranch | Add beef or grilled/fried chicken for +$6.25
Taco Salad
$16.99
Deep-fried 8" flour tortilla bowl with lettuce, tomato, onions, jalapeños, cheddar/Jack cheese, and queso. Served with a side of salsa and a choice of dressing.
Caesar Salad
$12.99
Fresh romaine, parmesan cheese, and croutons.
Garden Salad
$11.99
Mixed greens, tomatoes, onions, cheddar/Jack cheese, cucumbers, and croutons.
Soup Of The Day
$5.99/+
Cup $5.99, Bowl $8.99 | Freshly made soups every day.
Chili
$6.25/+
Cup $6.25, Bowl $9.25
Caprese Salad
$15.99
Fresh tomatoes, mozzarella cheese, basil, olive oil, and a balsamic glaze.
Desserts
Fresh Cheesecake
$9.50
Brownie Sundae
$9.50
